sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_intervals (event_date Date, duration IntervalHour) ENGINE = Memory;
UPDATE test_intervals SET duration = toIntervalHour(10) WHERE event_date = toDate('2024-06-15');
SELECT event_date, duration, event_date + duration AS new_date FROM test_intervals;
SELECT event_date + toIntervalHour(3) AS future_event_date FROM test_intervals WHERE duration > toIntervalHour(2);
